description: Composition Red knitted kurta, made of 100% acrylic, has a V-neck, long sleeves, cross-stitched panel around the neck and side vents Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately as colour may bleed Do not bleach Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron Keep warm with this kurta from aurelia. The knitted fabric will keep the heat in as well as having a lovely lustre which almost glows in the light. Black and red cross-stitch edging the neckline makes this perfect for an occasion requiring a simple traditional outfit, also you can pop it on over jeans for an easy, comfortable look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 35”
